title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, embed, pull models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM or embeddings in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, RAG, multi-user).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; chat, pull, list, delete models from JVM apps.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI for chatting with Ollama models from the terminal (Rust).

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-hub
summary: Community-curated list of Ollama tools, prompts, and model recipes.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that chats via Ollama, supports slash commands and model switching.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client library for Ollama with async HTTP and streaming support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with chat, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to spin up Ollama services in CI pipelines for testing LLM apps.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-rust-sdk
summary: Lightweight Rust SDK published on crates.io for chatting and embedding.
